phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Trevi Fountain is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è la Fontana di Trevi?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH lah fon-TAH-nah dee TREH-vee?
phrases.cultural_note: The Trevi Fountain is Rome's largest Baroque fountain — tossing a coin supposedly guarantees your return to Rome.

responses.english: Straight on, then follow the signs, it's very close.
responses.phonetic: SEM-preh DREET-toh, poi SEH-gwah ee kar-TEL-lee, eh vee-chee-NEES-see-mah.
responses.french: Sempre dritto, poi segua i cartelli, è vicinissima.

responses.english: Ten minutes on foot west of the Pantheon.
responses.phonetic: DYEH-chee mee-NOO-tee ah PYEH-dee VER-soh oh-VEST dal pan-TEH-on.
responses.french: Dieci minuti a piedi verso ovest dal Pantheon.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Campo de' Fiori market is held
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si fa il mercato a Campo de' Fiori?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see fah eel mer-KAH-toh ah KAM-poh deh FYOH-ree?

responses.english: In Campo de' Fiori itself, mornings until 1 pm.
responses.phonetic: een KAM-poh deh FYOH-ree STES-soh, lah mat-TEE-nah FEE-noh AL-leh treh-DEE-chee.
responses.french: In Campo de' Fiori stesso, la mattina fino alle tredici.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the best gelato near the Pantheon is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove fanno il gelato migliore vicino al Pantheon?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh FAN-noh eel jeh-LAH-toh meel-YOH-reh vee-CHEE-noh al pan-TEH-on?

responses.english: At Della Palma or Giolitti, two steps away.
responses.phonetic: dah DEL-lah PAL-mah oh joh-LEET-tee, ah DOO-eh PAS-see.
responses.french: Da Della Palma o Giolitti, a due passi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the historic centre is walkable from the train station
phrases.text_local: Scusi, si può raggiungere il centro storico a piedi dalla stazione?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, see PWOH raj-JOO-njeh-reh eel CHEN-troh STOH-ree-koh ah PYEH-dee DAL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh?

responses.english: Yes, about thirty minutes, or the metro line A.
responses.phonetic: see, CHEER-kah TREN-tah mee-NOO-tee, oh lah MEH-troh LEE-neh-ah ah.
responses.french: Sì, circa trenta minuti, o la metro linea A.
